# Support

Thanks for using **Agentic Engineering**. Here's where to go depending on what
you need.

## Documentation first

Most questions are answered in the docs and the plugin README:

- **Documentation site**: https://life-with-data.github.io/agentic-engineering/
  — getting started, and the full reference for agents, commands, skills, and
  MCP servers.
- **Plugin README**:
  [`plugins/agentic-engineering/README.md`](../plugins/agentic-engineering/README.md)
  — every component with a one-line description.
- **Changelog**:
  [`plugins/agentic-engineering/CHANGELOG.md`](../plugins/agentic-engineering/CHANGELOG.md)
  — what changed and when.

## Reporting a bug

If something is broken, open a
[GitHub issue](https://github.com/Life-With-Data/agentic-engineering/issues).
Please include:

- The component involved (agent, command, skill, hook, or docs tooling).
- What you expected to happen and what actually happened.
- Steps to reproduce, and any relevant output or error messages.
- Your environment (Claude Code version, OS).

Search existing issues first — someone may have already reported it.

## Requesting a feature or asking a question

Open an issue describing the use case and what you'd like to see. For open-ended
questions or ideas, an issue is fine too — there's no separate forum.

## Security issues

**Do not** report vulnerabilities through public issues. Follow the private
disclosure process in [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md).

## Contributing a fix

Want to fix it yourself? See [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md) for the
workflow and the checks your change needs to pass.
